jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at BikeDekho
jsonLd.description:
BikeDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BikeDekho:
BikeDekho is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho!
